payload.description:
As a Kanbus user
I want kbs run from a workspace root to discover all nested .kanbus.yml projects
So that issue lookups work across nested repos without per-project cwd logic.

Feature: Workspace discovery via .kanbus.yml

Scenario: Workspace root discovers nested projects
  Given a workspace root without a .kanbus.yml file
  And it contains nested repos each with .kanbus.yml
  When project directories are discovered
  Then all nested projects are included

Scenario: Single project root does not recurse
  Given a repo root with a .kanbus.yml file
  When project directories are discovered
  Then only that project is included

Scenario: Show by fragment requires uniqueness
  Given a workspace with multiple projects
  And two issues share the same fragment
  When I run "kanbus show <fragment>"
  Then the command should fail with "ambiguous identifier"
  And it should instruct to use full key+short hash
payload.title: Kanbus: recursive workspace discovery and unique fragment lookup
